LanguageData.MIL_GlobalWindows: Skin large windows with the Morrowind theme
LanguageData.MIL_SettingsBlurb: Morrowindish Menus focuses on the look and feel of the interface. It adds a custom inventory, equipment, and stats layout to the pawn gear tab and pushes a black and gold theme across key menus, while leaving normal RimWorld trading, hauling, and stockpile behavior alone.
LanguageData.MIL_DebugTraderVisitBlurb: Dev Mode only. Forces a friendly trader caravan to visit your current settlement map.
